scripts.build: npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/shared && npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/parser && npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/worker && npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @statisticalsystem/shared && npm run typecheck -w @statisticalsystem/parser && npm run typecheck -w @statisticalsystem/worker && npm run typecheck -w @statisticalsystem/web
scripts.cf:pages:create: sh -c 'test -n "$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" || { echo "CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is required"; exit 1; }; npx wrangler pages project create statisticalsystem'
scripts.cf:pages:deploy: sh -c 'test -n "$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" || { echo "CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is required"; exit 1; }; test -n "$VITE_API_BASE_URL" || { echo "VITE_API_BASE_URL is required"; exit 1; }; npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/web && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name statisticalsystem'
scripts.cf:worker:deploy: sh -c 'test -n "$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" || { echo "CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is required"; exit 1; }; npx wrangler deploy --config apps/worker/wrangler.jsonc'
